title: ScoreResponse
description: ARP Score phase response — workload fit prediction with explanation.

confidence.description: Confidence in the score prediction. Lower when historical data is sparse.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation of the score. Names the primary constraint.

constraints.description: Individual factors that contributed to the score, ordered by weight.

factor.description: Factor name (e.g. thermal_headroom, vram_fit, wes_history, reliability).

weight.description: Weight of this factor in the overall score (0.0–1.0).

detail.description: Human-readable explanation of this factor's assessment.

recommended.description: True if this node is the top-ranked recommendation for the workload.
